immutable_pillars.title: Absolute Verifiability
immutable_pillars.description: Every scientific claim must be empirically validated.

immutable_pillars.title: Epistemic Integrity
immutable_pillars.description: Full-path reasoning traces are mandatory for all assertions.

immutable_pillars.title: Non-Maleficence
immutable_pillars.description: Agent actions must not cause physical or systemic harm.

immutable_pillars.title: Hardware Assurance
immutable_pillars.description: Computational substrate must be formally verified (EBMC).

immutable_pillars.title: Privacy Preservation
immutable_pillars.description: Collaborative modes must use secure parameter sharing (QFL).

immutable_pillars.title: Recursive Safety
immutable_pillars.description: Meta-Cognitive loop regulates system's own evolution.

immutable_pillars.title: Provenance Integrity
immutable_pillars.description: Immutable FAIR-compliant trails via blockchain-like ledger.

immutable_pillars.title: User Centricity
immutable_pillars.description: Tangible user-facing benefits over internal optimizations.

immutable_pillars.title: Universal Intelligence
immutable_pillars.description: Seamless integration of global reasoning fabrics.

immutable_pillars.title: Causal Grounding
immutable_pillars.description: Hypotheses must be derived from Structural Causal Models.

immutable_pillars.title: Autonomous Improvement
immutable_pillars.description: Continuous self-optimization via Real-Time Signals Loop and Batch Analysis.

user_centric_strategic_pillars.title: Deep Free-Tier Integration
user_centric_strategic_pillars.description: Native support for free quantum backends.

user_centric_strategic_pillars.title: Seamless Hybrid Workloads
user_centric_strategic_pillars.description: Unified API for quantum-classical job submission.

user_centric_strategic_pillars.title: Adaptive Explainability
user_centric_strategic_pillars.description: Context-aware narratives based on user expertise.

articles.title: Production Rigor Mandate
articles.description: All components must be fully functional without mocks or stubs.
constraints: Verification pipeline mandatory for all artifacts
Blockchain provenance must anchor every claim
